content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be reframed as inherently curiosity-primed hierarchical structures where unused, low-priority memory traces act as a 'spontaneous curiosity reservoir' that complements explicit intrinsic reward mechanisms like ICM and RND. Instead of actively pruning stale memory to reduce computation, agents can automatically harvest prediction errors from forgotten memory traces to generate new exploratory goals without adding extra reward computation overhead.
